summary: 2026-06-26 11:55:01 PDT — The product change itself matches the PID-1 spec: `railway.json` uses the exact `exec node server/src/index.js` command, the existing Railway config test asserts that exact value, the shutdown test comment is corrected, and the prior-story note was appended. I could not verify the full gate because the read-only sandbox blocks Vitest temp writes and local listen/tmp operations. One scope blocker remains.

findings.title: Extra review artifacts violate AC6 scope
findings.claim: The branch adds `reviews/railway-pid1-shutdown.approach.json` and `reviews/railway-pid1-shutdown.design.json`, but AC6 in `reviews/railway-pid1-shutdown.md:92` says `git diff --name-only main...HEAD` should show no files beyond `railway.json`, `server/test/health.test.js`, `server/test/shutdown.test.js`, `reviews/graceful-shutdown.md`, and the story file. The current diff therefore violates the approved scoped file set.
findings.suggestion: Remove the two review JSON artifacts from the branch, or have Thomas explicitly amend AC6 to exempt committed review artifacts before merge.
